title: YouTube Poop: Robopenii
description:
Decided to forget about "part 2" to Hillary is a Slut...there's so much more poopable material out there!

So this here is an AoStH poop.  My brother got a DVD set of them for Christmas, so naturally they need to be pooped.  This poop contains clips from 3 episodes, "Sonic's Song," "Tails' New Home," and "Too Tall Tails."

I started this while I was on vacation and finished it as soon as I got home.  I got some advice from some people on the YCP forums, so I'm hoping this one is a little better.

Now stop reading this and get to laughing your ass off.
